home.title: Premium Motorcycle & Car Wrapping
home.desc: Wrapster Lab turns stock rides into stunning statements. Premium full-print wraps, custom concepts, and precision color changes — shipped nationwide.

hero.subtitle: We don't just change colors — we engineer identity. Full-print wraps, custom concepts, and precision color changes for motorcycles & cars.

beforeAfter.title: See the transformation
beforeAfter.lead: Slide across to watch a stock ride become a Wrapster statement — same machine, whole new identity.

services.title: Every ride, reimagined
services.lead: One lab, six ways to transform your machine. From subtle color swaps to full-blown custom concepts.

fullPrint.title: Full Print Wrapping
fullPrint.desc: Unlimited custom-printed designs across every panel — from race liveries to character art.

bodyOnly.title: Body Only Wrapping
bodyOnly.desc: Send just your body panels. We wrap, QC, and ship them back ready to bolt on.

carWrap.title: Car Wrapping
carWrap.desc: Full color changes and branding for cars — commercial fleets to personal builds.

concept.title: Custom Concept Design
concept.desc: Themed builds — anime, characters, racing. We design the concept, you approve the mockup.

colorChange.title: Color Change
colorChange.desc: Gloss, satin, matte, and chrome finishes from an 80+ color wall you can see in person.

ship.title: Order Without Your Bike
ship.desc: Ship your body to us or we ship the sticker to you. Nationwide, no bike drop-off needed.

process.title: The Stock-to-Stunning process
process.lead: A precise, five-step pipeline built to protect your ride and nail the finish.

consult.title: Consult & Concept
consult.desc: Tell us your vibe. We scope the concept, materials, and timeline together.

design.title: Design Mockup
design.desc: Our designers render a full mockup so you see the result before we cut a thing.

wrap.title: Precision Wrapping
wrap.desc: Certified installers wrap every curve with premium, bubble-free material.

qc.title: QC & 7-Day Check
qc.desc: Quality check on finish, edges, and adhesion — plus a follow-up after one week.

ride.title: Ride Stunning
ride.desc: Roll out with a machine that turns heads and reflects exactly who you are.

features.title: Built like a lab, backed like a promise
features.lead: Premium materials, real guarantees, and a team obsessed with the details.

material.title: Premium Materials
material.desc: Automotive-grade films engineered for color depth and long-term durability.

warranty.title: After-Sales Warranty
warranty.desc: Covered against air bubbling, edge peeling, and installation faults.

qc.title: Multi-Stage QC
qc.desc: Finish QC, one-week usage check, and maintenance guidance on every job.

nationwide.title: Nationwide Shipping
nationwide.desc: Order from anywhere in Indonesia — send the body or receive the sticker.

team.title: Experienced Team
team.desc: A crew that has transformed 320+ builds across scooters, sport bikes, and cars.

custom.title: Unlimited Concepts
custom.desc: If you can dream it, we can print it. No template limits on custom work.

gallery.title: Stock to stunning, on repeat
gallery.lead: A slice of what rolls out of the Wrapster Lab. Every build is one of one.

colors.title: 80+ finishes, one perfect match
colors.lead: Gloss, satin, matte, and chrome — swatched and ready. Here's a taste of the spectrum.
colors.note: Visit the lab to see the full color wall in person.

items.t1: Dropped off a stock scooter, picked up a head-turner. The finish is flawless and the crew actually cares.
items.t2: The concept mockup nailed my idea on the first try. Everyone at the meetup asked who did the wrap.
items.t3: Shipped my body panels from out of town and got them back perfect. Nationwide service is the real deal.

event.title: Wrapster Sunmori
event.desc: Riding, hanging out, and good vibes with the whole Wrapster family. Wrapped or not, every rider is welcome to join.
event.route: Start: Tracker Martadinata → Finish: KFC Sukawangi

contact.title: Let's build something loud
contact.lead: Tell us about your ride and your idea. The lab is ready when you are.
contact.waMessage: Hi Wrapster Lab! I'd like to talk about wrapping my ride.

cta.title: Your ride deserves better than stock
cta.subtitle: Book a slot at the lab and let's turn it into a statement.

error.title: Off the grid
error.message: This page took a wrong turn.

footer.tagline: Premium motorcycle & car wrapping. Stock to Stunning.
